tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: The new regulations resulted _________ a significant drop in pollution levels across the region.
"Why did you leave the party so early?" -- "I wasn't keen _________ staying any longer -- the music was far too loud."
The researchers have been accused _________ manipulating the data to support their hypothesis.
She takes great pride _________ her ability to resolve conflicts between team members.
"Have you heard from the landlord yet?" -- "Yes, he finally agreed _________ reducing the rent by ten per cent."
The witness's account was not consistent _________ the evidence found at the scene.
